---
id: pipeline-abort
title: "Aborts a pipeline"
description: "Aborts a pipeline. You need to provide the app slug and the id of the pipeline. You can add an abort reason, choose to skip notifications and make the abort with success state."
sidebar_label: "Aborts a pipeline"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Aborts a pipeline"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/pipelines/{pipeline-id}/abort"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Aborts a pipeline. You need to provide the app slug and the id of the pipeline. You can add an abort reason, choose to skip notifications and make the abort with success state.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
